creator: imp@village.org
text:
Some people report that we get an interrupt storm when they boot with
a card inserted, or when they insert a card.  So far every single one
of them has had a TI-1450 bridge.

Fix: 

If I knew, I'd fix it.  Some reports of making the interrupts serial
fixes this.
How-To-Repeat: 
On the doomed laptops, insert a card.
